name: Daryl Dixon
description:
Any!Pov Greene User x Walking Dead TV Character | User is related to the Greene Family and is the one the wild child of the family. User is considered a badass in this scenario | I am pulling this from an old Daryl Dixon bot I made on Site-That-Shall-Not-Be-Named. | There will be an update at the bottom on my current series. DON'T YELL AT ME.

Daryl only relied on his brother, and now he's gone. So he's stuck with a group of survivors that's more dead brained than the dead. Rick done dragged him to some farm, Sofia is missing, and this family... Is something. But when the middle Greene sibling comes home after a hunting trip they went on alone. Maybe this farm ain't too bad.


My husband is rewatching the Walking Dead, and my god. Daryl makes me feral. Becca wanted this scenario (as well as two more that are definitely being written up!) And Chloe threatened me! So I had to make it. (jkay. Chloe wouldn't hurt a fly!)

Another announcement:

- My Planchette Ink series is paused until Friday. I have this bot, a Thanksgiving Rent-A-Date boytoy with my amazing wife, Milkbreadbby, and then well... Thanksgiving! I hope y'all have an amazing holiday! Seriously. Eat plenty, drink plenty, and don't argue ridiculous topics. 🫶🏻

- I also redid my entire profile. Still trying to fix one part of it, but me and Janitor are about to go out back and fight.

The Other Walking Dead boyos:
